revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Main|Template:Maplink/doc}} This template was created to provide a reduced parameter set and standardized appearance for [[Template:Maplink]] when used in [[Template:Infobox road]]. Namely the parameters frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 are assumed. By use of the [[Module:Template wrapper|Template wrapper module]], these default parameters can be modified to suit specific needs, and additional parameters that are valid in Maplink can be included, such as title, description, stroke-color, etc. ==Parameters== {| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Position !! colspan="2" | Notes |- | zoom || 1 || forwards to {{maplink|zoom=\d+}} | rowspan="3" style="width:50%" | These parameters are intentionally in the same order that they appear at the end of [[OpenStreetMap]] urls, to ease conversion of anchors such as [https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=13/30.2795/-97.7515 #map=13/30.2795/-97.7515] to the form {{maplink|13|30.2795|-97.7515}}. Some way to extract all three values from a single parameter with slashes would be good too. |- | lat || 2 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-lat=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | long || 3 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-long=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | id || 4 || colspan="2" | the [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] id is optional as the template can determine this from the page on which it is being used. |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Map templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Main|Template:Maplink/doc}} This template was created to provide a reduced parameter set and standardized appearance for [[Template:Maplink]] when used in [[Template:Infobox road]]. Namely the parameters frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 are assumed. By use of the [[Module:Template wrapper|Template wrapper module]], these default parameters can be modified to suit specific needs, and additional parameters that are valid in Maplink can be included, such as title, description, stroke-color, etc. ==Parameters== {| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Position !! colspan="2" | Notes |- | zoom || 1 || forwards to {{maplink|zoom=\d+}} | rowspan="3" style="width:50%" | These parameters are intentionally in the same order that they appear at the end of [[:en:OpenStreetMap|OpenStreetMap]] urls, to ease conversion of anchors such as [https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=13/30.2795/-97.7515 #map=13/30.2795/-97.7515] to the form {{maplink|13|30.2795|-97.7515}}. Some way to extract all three values from a single parameter with slashes would be good too. |- | lat || 2 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-lat=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | long || 3 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-long=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | id || 4 || colspan="2" | the [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] id is optional as the template can determine this from the page on which it is being used. |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Map templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Main|Template:Maplink/doc}} This template was created to provide a reduced parameter set and standardized appearance for [[Template:Maplink]] when used in [[Template:Infobox road]]. Namely the parameters frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 are assumed. By use of the [[Module:Template wrapper|Template wrapper module]], these default parameters can be modified to suit specific needs, and additional parameters that are valid in Maplink can be included, such as title, description, stroke-color, etc. ==Parameters== {| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Position !! colspan="2" | Notes |- | zoom || 1 || forwards to {{maplink|zoom=\d+}} | rowspan="3" style="width:50%" | These parameters are intentionally in the same order that they appear at the end of [[:en:OpenStreetMap|OpenStreetMap]] urls, to ease conversion of anchors such as [https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=13/30.2795/-97.7515 #map=13/30.2795/-97.7515] to the form {{maplink|13|30.2795|-97.7515}}. Some way to extract all three values from a single parameter with slashes would be good too. |- | lat || 2 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-lat=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | long || 3 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-long=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | id || 4 || colspan="2" | the [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] id is optional as the template can determine this from the page on which it is being used. |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Map templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Main|Template:Maplink/doc}} This template was created to provide a reduced parameter set and standardized appearance for [[Template:Maplink]] when used in [[Template:Infobox road]]. Namely the parameters frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 are assumed. By use of the [[Module:Template wrapper|Template wrapper module]], these default parameters can be modified to suit specific needs, and additional parameters that are valid in Maplink can be included, such as title, description, stroke-color, etc. ==Parameters== {| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Position !! colspan="2" | Notes |- | zoom || 1 || forwards to {{maplink|zoom=\d+}} | rowspan="3" style="width:50%" | These parameters are intentionally in the same order that they appear at the end of [[:en:OpenStreetMap|OpenStreetMap]] urls, to ease conversion of anchors such as [https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=13/30.2795/-97.7515 #map=13/30.2795/-97.7515] to the form {{maplink|13|30.2795|-97.7515}}. Some way to extract all three values from a single parameter with slashes would be good too. |- | lat || 2 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-lat=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | long || 3 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-long=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | id || 4 || colspan="2" | the [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] id is optional as the template can determine this from the page on which it is being used. |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Map templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Main|Template:Maplink/doc}} This template was created to provide a reduced parameter set and standardized appearance for [[Template:Maplink]] when used in [[Template:Infobox road]]. Namely the parameters frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 are assumed. By use of the [[Module:Template wrapper|Template wrapper module]], these default parameters can be modified to suit specific needs, and additional parameters that are valid in Maplink can be included, such as title, description, stroke-color, etc. ==Parameters== {| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Position !! colspan="2" | Notes |- | zoom || 1 || forwards to {{maplink|zoom=\d+}} | rowspan="3" style="width:50%" | These parameters are intentionally in the same order that they appear at the end of [[:en:OpenStreetMap|OpenStreetMap]] urls, to ease conversion of anchors such as [https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=13/30.2795/-97.7515 #map=13/30.2795/-97.7515] to the form {{maplink|13|30.2795|-97.7515}}. Some way to extract all three values from a single parameter with slashes would be good too. |- | lat || 2 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-lat=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | long || 3 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-long=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | id || 4 || colspan="2" | the [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] id is optional as the template can determine this from the page on which it is being used. |} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Map templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23513454770|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Main|Template:Maplink/doc}} This template was created to provide a reduced parameter set and standardized appearance for [[Template:Maplink]] when used in [[Template:Infobox road]]. Namely the parameters frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 are assumed. By use of the [[Module:Template wrapper|Template wrapper module]], these default parameters can be modified to suit specific needs, and additional parameters that are valid in Maplink can be included, such as title, description, stroke-color, etc. ==Parameters== {| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Position !! colspan="2" | Notes |- | zoom || 1 || forwards to {{maplink|zoom=\d+}} | rowspan="3" style="width:50%" | These parameters are intentionally in the same order that they appear at the end of [[:en:OpenStreetMap|OpenStreetMap]] urls, to ease conversion of anchors such as [https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=13/30.2795/-97.7515 #map=13/30.2795/-97.7515] to the form {{maplink|13|30.2795|-97.7515}}. Some way to extract all three values from a single parameter with slashes would be good too. |- | lat || 2 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-lat=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | long || 3 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-long=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | id || 4 || colspan="2" | the [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] id is optional as the template can determine this from the page on which it is being used. |} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Map templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Main|Template:Maplink/doc}} This template was created to provide a reduced parameter set and standardized appearance for [[Template:Maplink]] when used in [[Template:Infobox road]]. Namely the parameters frame = yes | frame-width = 290 | frame-height = 240 | frame-align = center | plain = yes | type = line | stroke-width = 2 | stroke-color = #cc0000 are assumed. By use of the [[Module:Template wrapper|Template wrapper module]], these default parameters can be modified to suit specific needs, and additional parameters that are valid in Maplink can be included, such as title, description, stroke-color, etc. ==Parameters== {| class="wikitable" ! Name !! Position !! colspan="2" | Notes |- | zoom || 1 || forwards to {{maplink|zoom=\d+}} | rowspan="3" style="width:50%" | These parameters are intentionally in the same order that they appear at the end of [[:en:OpenStreetMap|OpenStreetMap]] urls, to ease conversion of anchors such as [https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=13/30.2795/-97.7515 #map=13/30.2795/-97.7515] to the form {{maplink|13|30.2795|-97.7515}}. Some way to extract all three values from a single parameter with slashes would be good too. |- | lat || 2 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-lat=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | long || 3 || forwards to {{maplink|frame-long=\-?\d+(?:\.\d+)?}} |- | id || 4 || colspan="2" | the [[WP:Wikidata|Wikidata]] id is optional as the template can determine this from the page on which it is being used. |} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Map templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
